instruction: Implement Point and Line classes in geometry/__init__.py per the spec in README.md. Read the README carefully — pay special attention to: (a) the 1e-6 floating-point tolerance for Line.contains(), and (b) the case where Line.start == Line.end (zero-length segment, must not divide by zero). The tests in tests/test_geometry.py exercise the contract; all of them must pass. Do not modify the README or the tests.
calibration_note: Hardened 2026-04-25 (option 3). Added: floating-point-tolerance check (1e-6 per spec), zero-length-segment edge case. See docs/PROJECT_KNOWLEDGE_BASE.md §28.5.
